title: cabobanthus bullulatus
intro: Cabobanthus bullulatus, also known as Bullate Cabobanthus or Bullate Mountain Sage, is a flowering plant species in the genus Cabobanthus, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cabobanthus bullulatus include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cabobanthus bullulatus can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to alleviate respiratory issues and promote relaxation.
